meaning: n.赌,赌博,赌注vt.下赌注,保证vi.打赌
examples: I'll wager that she knows more about it than she's saying.
I never heard the name in my life. I'll wager anything it is not in the calendar!
Laurence has just won a wager with his team over the number of Vodafone VIP members who bought tickets for concerts.
Anyone want to wager a guess on when Facebook raises another large round of cash?
With the fuel still struggled to find support, the wager will continue to inflict pain.
